body: I'm trying to learn bread baking. My sourdough starter keeps dying. Any tips?
Feed it consistently at the same time every day. Use equal parts flour and water by weight.
Should I keep it at room temperature or in the fridge?
Room temp if you bake often, fridge if you only bake weekly. Fridge slows down fermentation.
Also try whole wheat flour for feeding — it has more wild yeast and nutrients than white flour.
